executives.name: Beverly Goulet
executives.background: Beverly joined the Board in July 2017. She has significant experience in the airline industry, having held senior roles at American Airlines, including Senior Vice President and Chief Integration Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Integration Officer

executives.name: Cindy Fiedelman
executives.background: Ms. Fiedelman has served as our Chief People Officer since 2016. Previously, she held human resources leadership roles at American Airlines and Avaya.

executives.name: Gregory Smith
executives.background: Gregory D. Smith has been a director since 2021. He was previously CFO and Executive Vice President of Enterprise Operations at The Boeing Company.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Chairman of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Isabella Goren
executives.background: Former CFO of American Airlines and AMR Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
